label: Customer Service
description: Tier-1 customer-service agent for a small business website chat widget. Bundled example: Easy Coffee.

brand.input_placeholder: ask Easy Coffee about hours, menu, ordering...

welcome: Hi! I'm the Easy Coffee assistant. Ask about hours, the menu, ordering, or events — I'll only answer from what I actually know, and I'll flag a teammate to follow up if I can't help.
suggestions: Can I book the back room for an event?
